note: Each category key maps to its annotation color, short code, and count of detected elements.

login.label: Login / Auth
login.description: Login/logout, sign-in/up buttons, username/password fields, social auth controls. Detected via text keywords (로그인, login, sign in), href patterns, class/id, and input type=password.

search.label: Search
search.description: Search input boxes, search submit buttons, and search-scoped form areas.

tab.label: Tab / Accordion
tab.description: Tab bars, tab panels, accordion headers, and expandable/collapsible sections.

card.label: Card / List Item
card.description: Repeated card or list-item containers — product cards, article tiles, result entries.

input.label: Input Field
input.description: Generic text/email/date/number/textarea inputs not classified as search or login.

link.label: Link
link.description: Anchor links not clearly acting as nav menu items or auth controls.

heading.label: Heading / Text
heading.description: h1–h6 headings and elements with role=heading.

media.label: Image / Media
media.description: Images, video elements, <canvas>, <svg>, <iframe>, and other media containers.

layout.label: Header / Footer
layout.description: Major layout regions — site header, footer, sidebars, <main>, <section>, <article>.

unknown.label: Unknown
unknown.description: Could not be classified by any heuristic rule.

modal.label: Modal / Dialog
modal.description: Dialogs, overlays, popups, lightboxes, and other content that blocks page interaction.

form.label: Form
form.description: Top-level form containers grouping inputs and submit actions.

dropdown.label: Dropdown / Select
dropdown.description: <select> elements, ARIA comboboxes, listboxes, and dropdown menus.

checkbox.label: Checkbox / Radio
checkbox.description: Checkbox inputs, radio buttons, toggle switches, and ARIA switch controls.

nav.label: Navigation / Menu
nav.description: Navigation bars, site menus, breadcrumbs, hamburger menus, and sidebar navigation.

pagination.label: Pagination
pagination.description: Page number links, next/previous controls, and pagination containers.

banner.label: Banner / Ad
banner.description: Promotional banners, advertisement containers, sponsor ribbons, and ad slots.
